name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Ian Affleck
description:
!MLA!

(Singer!user)

Ian couldn't help but go after you...

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟜𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｆｒｉｅｎｄｓ】

I dont know why but I think "GOSSIP" by Måneskin fits him- so theres a song if yall want something to listen to ;).

This is an alternate universe where Mason is actually oblivious to {{user}}'s feelings and never dated :((. Originally I was only going to do Mason, but alot of people wanted the other band members so I might do the rest of em, but I decided to start with Ian just cuz 💪💪. I think I'm kind of on a roll so another bot might get posted today, we'll see 😈. Also I did change up the personality to shorten it a bit since I got some feedback! I didn't change the formatting entirely since I kind of like the way it's organized but hopefully it helps?? Lmk what you think if you guys have an opinion :)). And... uh. Bad news but I think the next three bots might be angst as well 😭. The Orion inspired character I think could also be fluff... potentially... Sorry for making you all suffer😔. If you've been here for a while you know I don't usually make so much angst- but this little storyline of mine is just quite tragic...

BTW THANKS ALL FOR 3400+ FOLLOWERS!! Holy shit so many of you followed in such a short span of time its lowkey scary 😭😭. I already wrote out a thank you note on my last bot, so I'll keep this short, but yes thank you all. Both old and new followers, it means a lot that you're here with me <3.

Current Queue:

Mason's last (for now) alt!! -> Orion inspired character (from Infamous IF) [request] -> WIPEOUT - Levi [request] -> Requests!!

!!Used vynnaep’s formatting for the personality!!

ART IS NOT MINE: Made by @1rnrn99 on Twitter!! Thank you to my reliable pookie @Foxy_Haeven 😘
